C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ar.exe qc libchdr-static.a "CMakeFiles/chdr-static.dir/src/libchdr_bitstream.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/chdr-static.dir/src/libchdr_cdrom.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/chdr-static.dir/src/libchdr_chd.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/chdr-static.dir/src/libchdr_flac.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/chdr-static.dir/src/libchdr_huffman.c.obj"
C:\TDM-GCC-64\bin\ranlib.exe libchdr-static.a
